gaps_union: Vendor obligation to comply with applicable data protection laws
Vendor obligation to maintain records of processing activities
Vendor obligation to notify Customer of legally binding requests for personal data from government authorities
Vendor obligation to maintain a record of processing activities (ROPA)
Vendor obligation to notify Customer of government or law enforcement access requests for Personal Data
Processor obligation to maintain records of processing activities
Notification of law enforcement or government access requests for personal data
Data retention and deletion during the active engagement
